notes: Healthcare resume. Name line includes credential suffixes ('MSN, RN, CCRN' — these are cert-like but follow the name and should be stripped, not used as the name itself). 'CLINICAL EXPERIENCE' section header (not in our aliases — should fall through). Specialty section 'LICENSURE & CERTIFICATIONS' contains a license number that should not become a separate cert entry. Roles use 'Title, RN' suffix pattern. The skills section is intentionally empty in the resume — tests that we don't fail when there's no Skills section.
